nasb.text: For you will go out with joy And be led forth with peace; The mountains and the hills will break forth into shouts of joy before you, And all the trees of the field will clap their hands.

esv.text: “For you shall go out in joy and be led forth in peace; the mountains and the hills before you shall break forth into singing, and all the trees of the field shall clap their hands.

cnv.text: 你們必歡歡喜喜出來， 平平安安蒙引導； 大山小山都必在你們面前發聲歡呼， 田野所有的樹木也都拍掌。

ccb.text: 你们必欢欢喜喜地出来， 平平安安地蒙引导， 大山小山都要在你们面前歌唱， 田野的树木也都拍掌。

csbs.text: “你们将欢欢喜喜地出来， 平平安安地蒙引领； 群山和冈陵必在你们面前放声欢呼， 田野里所有的树木也都拍掌。
